recommendations.title: Kuroko's Basketball the Movie: Last Game
recommendations.overview: Kuroko reunites with the "Generation of Miracles" when former rivals are humiliated in an exhibition game against a notorious street basketball team.

recommendations.title: Adidas Vs. Puma: The Brother's Feud
recommendations.overview: Two brothers start a sportswear company in the 1920s, hoping to make the best shoes in the world. Their relationship deteriorates until they become bitter rivals.

recommendations.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
recommendations.overview: Mr. Bean wins a trip to Cannes where he unwittingly separates a young boy from his father and must help the two reunite. On the way he discovers France, bicycling and true love, among other things.

recommendations.title: The Last American Virgin
recommendations.overview: The friendship of a group of young friends struggling with teen sex, drugs, and work is jeopardized by a romantic interest which may turn pals into bitter rivals.

recommendations.title: The Last of Sheila
recommendations.overview: A year after Sheila is killed in a hit-and-run, her multimillionaire husband invites a group of friends to spend a week on his yacht playing a scavenger hunt-style mystery game—but the game turns out to be all too real and all too deadly.

recommendations.title: Pushpa 2 - The Rule
recommendations.overview: As his smuggling empire grows, a brazen Pushpa longs for power and respect on his vengeful journey, while facing old rivals and new.

recommendations.title: Harpoon
recommendations.overview: Rivalries, dark secrets, and sexual tension emerge when three best friends find themselves stranded on a yacht in the middle of the ocean under suspicious circumstances.

recommendations.title: Perfect Strangers
recommendations.overview: During a lunar eclipse, seven friends gather for dinner and decide to play a game in which they must share with each other the content of every message, email or phone call they receive throughout the evening.

recommendations.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
recommendations.overview: Four teenagers in detention discover an old video game console with a game they’ve never heard of. When they decide to play, they are immediately sucked into the jungle world of Jumanji in the bodies of their avatars. They’ll have to complete the adv

recommendations.title: Stay Alive
